mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT n.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@WM_ARRIVAL_NOTICE} AS sourceDocType, n.code AS sourceDocCode, l.id AS sourceLineId, n.arrival_date AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@IQC.type} AS qcType, l.item_id AS itemId, l.arrival_quantity AS quantityToCheck, n.vendor_id AS vendorId FROM mes_wm_arrival_notice n JOIN mes_wm_arrival_notice_line l ON n.id = l.notice_id WHERE n.status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmArrivalNoticeStatusEnum@PENDING_QC.status} AND l.iqc_check_flag = 1 AND l.iqc_id IS NULL AND n.deleted = 0 AND l.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@WM_OUTSOURCE_RECPT} AS sourceDocType, r.code AS sourceDocCode, rl.id AS sourceLineId, r.receipt_date AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@IQC.type} AS qcType, rl.item_id AS itemId, rl.quantity AS quantityToCheck, r.vendor_id AS vendorId FROM mes_wm_outsource_receipt r JOIN mes_wm_outsource_receipt_line rl ON r.id = rl.receipt_id WHERE r.status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmOutsourceReceiptStatusEnum@CONFIRMED.status} AND rl.iqc_check = 1 AND rl.iqc_id IS NULL AND r.deleted = 0 AND rl.deleted = 0 ) t
AND t.sourceDocCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sourceDocCode}, '%')
AND t.qcType = #{qcType}
AND t.itemId = #{itemId}
ORDER BY t.recordTime DESC
